creator: henrik@gulbra.net
text: As far as I can tell, the entire point of the writing thread is to limit the VNC frame rate to ~25Hz, so we don't use 100% of the CPU for display updates. Otherwise, you could just call rfb_send_screen() directly from rfb_recv_update_msg(), like I did in "#ifdef USE_MAXIMUM_FRAME_RATE" in my patch. With an immediate wakeup, you rely on the client to limit the frame rate.
